items.description: Employer launch acceleration initiative focused on improving employer policy & program management, eligibility, payroll & HRIS sync, and settlement, invoicing & payroll reconciliation to make multi-country employer rollouts faster and less manual across Employer Admin Portal, Employer Integration API, and Employer KPI Cockpit.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease program go-live lead time by standardizing policy setup, employer onboarding, and payroll integration workflows.
Increase eligible employee bike adoption by giving employers a cleaner and faster launch experience that reaches employees sooner.

businessKPIs.kpi: Net revenue retention from employer programs
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net revenue retention from employer programs by reducing rollout friction and improving early employer confidence.
Increase employers live on platform by converting signed employers into operational launches more predictably.

productBricks.change: Extended Employer Policy & Program Management with reusable launch templates and country-specific rollout controls.
Extended Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync with cleaner payroll mapping and eligibility event handling.
Extended Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation with clearer employer billing and payroll reconciliation workflows.
Extended Enterprise Integration Layer with reusable payroll and HRIS connector patterns for employer onboarding.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced launch workflow updates in Employer Admin Portal.
Introduced rollout and payroll integration updates in Employer Integration API.
Introduced launch-readiness and adoption tracking updates in Employer KPI Cockpit.

items.description: Rider conversion and trust initiative focused on improving bike catalog & recommendation, order orchestration & checkout, rider identity, wallet & app experience, and communications & notifications across iOS App, Android App, Rider Web Experience, and Lifecycle Notifications.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase quote-to-order conversion by making affordability, order status, and handover expectations more transparent.
Decrease time to first confirmed order by removing order blockers and improving rider guidance.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase active riders by converting more interested employees into delivered and activated riders.
Increase renewal and upgrade rate by starting the contract lifecycle with stronger rider trust.

productBricks.change: Extended Bike Catalog & Recommendation with commute-oriented package guidance and better local-availability signaling.
Extended Order Orchestration & Checkout with clearer step sequencing, approval handling, and order-state transparency.
Extended Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience with richer status views, document access, and post-order self-service.
Extended Communications & Notifications with event-driven reminders and delivery-stage updates.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced rider conversion and order-tracking improvements in iOS App.
Introduced rider conversion and order-tracking improvements in Android App.
Introduced quote and enrollment workflow improvements in Rider Web Experience.
Introduced proactive lifecycle messages in Lifecycle Notifications.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Rider conversion and trust: validated discovery

items.description: Partner service control tower initiative focused on improving dealer & service partner network management, stock, availability & handover planning, service case & maintenance orchestration, and insurance & claims administration across Partner Portal and Partner Integration API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase order completeness rate by validating order packets before dealers accept fulfillment work.
Decrease service turnaround time by standardizing workshop intake, approvals, and closure workflows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase active partner coverage by improving operational trust and making platform work easier for dealers.
Decrease partner churn rate by shortening reimbursement and service-resolution friction.

productBricks.change: Extended Dealer & Service Partner Network Management with clearer SLA, onboarding, and partner performance workflows.
Extended Stock, Availability & Handover Planning with better reservation and appointment handling.
Extended Service Case & Maintenance Orchestration with workflow templates for repairs, inspections, and maintenance closure.
Extended Insurance & Claims Administration with cleaner evidence capture and reimbursement routing.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced service and order workflow updates in Partner Portal.
Introduced partner-system status and stock exchange updates in Partner Integration API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Partner Service Control Tower: dealer network economics discovery

items.description: Fleet mobility pilot initiative focused on improving pool bike & fleet management, trip, telematics & asset monitoring, service case & maintenance orchestration, and operational data, KPI & analytics platform across Fleet Admin Console and Fleet User Mobile Experience.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase asset availability by making maintenance readiness and asset-state visibility part of the daily fleet workflow.
Increase rides per asset per week by making booking and assignment better aligned with operational work.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase recurring revenue from fleet programs by proving fleets can be run with consistent service and reporting.
Increase fleet locations live by giving pilot customers enough evidence to expand to more sites.

productBricks.change: Extended Pool Bike & Fleet Management with booking, assignment, and asset-state improvements for operational users.
Extended Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring with better operational telemetry and asset visibility.
Extended Service Case & Maintenance Orchestration to cover pooled fleet inspections and maintenance scheduling.
Extended Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform with fleet utilization, downtime, and task-substitution reporting.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced fleet planning and asset-readiness updates in Fleet Admin Console.
Introduced booking and issue-reporting updates in Fleet User Mobile Experience.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Fleet expansion model: pooled bike operations discovery
